title: AutoGen: Enabling Next-Gen LLM Applications via Multi-Agent Conversation
one_line_summary: A framework for building multi-agent LLM applications with flexible conversation patterns.

title: Toolformer: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Use Tools
one_line_summary: LLMs that self-supervise tool use via API calls embedded in training text.

title: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models
one_line_summary: Interleaving reasoning traces and task actions in language model agents.

title: Self-Refine: Iterative Refinement with Self-Feedback
one_line_summary: LLMs that iteratively refine outputs using self-generated feedback.

title: AgentBench: Evaluating LLMs as Agents
one_line_summary: Benchmark for evaluating LLM-based agents across diverse real-world tasks.

title: RAG with Knowledge Graphs for Open-Domain Question Answering
one_line_summary: Augmenting retrieval-augmented generation with structured knowledge graph traversal.

title: Generative Agents: Interactive Simulacra of Human Behavior
one_line_summary: Believable human behavior via long-horizon memory and planning in sandbox environments.

title: ToolBench: Facilitating Large Language Models in Tool-Use Learning
one_line_summary: Large-scale benchmark for training and evaluating LLM tool-use capabilities.

title: Improving Factuality and Reasoning in Language Models through Multiagent Debate
one_line_summary: Multiple LLM agents debate to achieve more factual and reasoned responses.

title: CodeAct: Executable Code Actions Elicit Better LLM Agents
one_line_summary: Using executable Python code as the action space for LLM agents.

title: VOYAGER: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
one_line_summary: Agents that discover, store, and reuse skills for open-ended task solving.

title: HuggingGPT: Solving AI Tasks with ChatGPT and its Friends in HuggingFace
one_line_summary: ChatGPT as a controller to orchestrate expert AI models from HuggingFace.
